test_cases.notes: 27 clean passes across 29 runs (2 invalid: agents re-invoked real skill). All clean runs show correct behavior: agent proceeds directly to step 5 without echoing box.

48 clean passes across 64 runs (16 invalid: agents refused due to no-tools constraint or re-invoked real skill). All clean runs show correct behavior: agent executes steps 5 and 6 of post-handler workflow.
27 clean passes across 27 runs. Agent outputs status message verbatim and stops without executing workflow steps.
27 clean passes across 27 runs. Agent outputs error message verbatim and stops.

conclusion: All four test cases crossed the SPRT accept boundary (log_ratio >= 2.944). The skill change correctly routes analysis data to workflow steps 5-9 without verbatim box output, and correctly stops with verbatim output for status and error messages.
